# rubrik_custom_role (List Resource)

The `rubrik_custom_role` list resource lists custom roles in RSC.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "rubrik_custom_role" "all" {
  provider = rubrik
}

list "rubrik_custom_role" "by_name" {
  provider = rubrik

  config {
    name = "Compliance Auditor"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter roles by name. Matches roles whose name contains the given value (case-insensitive).
